nodes.label: Vityilló App Icon 512px – dark forest green rounded-square PWA/app icon featuring a cream/ivory silhouette scene of two deer (doe and stag facing each other) surrounded by pine trees with mountain peaks in the background; style is flat vector silhouette; palette: deep forest green background (#2d5a3d approx) with warm cream/ivory motif; conveys luxury nature/wilderness lodge brand identity
nodes.norm_label: vityillo app icon 512px – dark forest green rounded-square pwa/app icon featuring a cream/ivory silhouette scene of two deer (doe and stag facing each other) surrounded by pine trees with mountain peaks in the background; style is flat vector silhouette; palette: deep forest green background (#2d5a3d approx) with warm cream/ivory motif; conveys luxury nature/wilderness lodge brand identity

links.note: Rounded-square app-icon shape, single-colour silhouette style, no text — consistent with a premium nature-retreat or luxury hotel brand identity for Vityilló
Background is deep forest green (#2d5a3d approx); illustration is cream/ivory — classic luxury nature palette
Icon shows two deer facing each other, flanked by pine trees and mountain peaks rendered as a cream-coloured silhouette illustration
The apple-icon.png is the iOS home-screen icon for the Vityilló site, directly representing its brand identity.
Icon displays a cream/beige mountain range with two deer and pine trees on a deep forest-green rounded-square background — the brand's nature/luxury motif.
Dark forest green (#1a5c2a range) monochrome flat silhouette style; white background; suggests luxury nature retreat branding consistent with a hotel in forested or mountain surroundings
The mountain-deer-forest motif is the core visual symbol of the Vityilló luxury hotel brand, evoking wilderness and exclusivity.
All silhouette elements are rendered in a warm cream/pale yellow tone on a white/transparent background
Image shows a flat silhouette emblem with two deer (doe and stag with antlers), conifer trees, and three mountain peaks arranged in a landscape composition
Located in /public/brand/ directory, named 'emblem-cream', indicating it is an official brand emblem asset of the Vityilló luxury hotel project in its cream colorway

Image shows a dark green silhouette emblem featuring two deer (a doe and a stag with antlers) standing in front of pine/fir trees, with snow-capped mountain peaks in the background — a classic forest/nature luxury lodge motif
Deep forest green background with warm cream/ivory silhouette motif

properties.description: Cream/off-white colored logo on white background; badge-style composition featuring two deer silhouettes (stag and doe) standing in a mountain landscape with pine/fir trees flanking them and mountain peaks in the background; wordmark 'VITYILLÓ' in bold serif/display capitals below the illustration; a small pine tree ornament beneath the wordmark; warm luxury nature aesthetic
properties.style: silhouette illustration, badge/crest, luxury outdoor/nature brand
properties.purpose: alternate colorway logo for use on dark backgrounds

attributes.description: Dark forest green monochrome silhouette badge logo. Features two deer (a doe and a stag with antlers) standing on grass, flanked by pine/fir trees, with mountain peaks in the background. The brand name VITYILLÓ appears in bold serif capitals beneath the scene, with a small pine tree ornament below. White background. Style is classic, nature/outdoors, luxury hunting lodge aesthetic.

links.note: Vercel is the primary deployment platform for Next.js; these logos appear together as the canonical pair in Next.js starter templates
